leadText: The Ravaged Path (Japanese: 荒れた抜け道 Barren Path) is a small cave that is located on Route 204, separating Jubilife City from Floaroma Town. It is a small path that can only be crossed using Rock Smash, and there are items to the north that can only be reached by using Surf. After climbing the steps and smashing the rocks to the right, the player can exit the cave and enter the upper part of Route 204.
